mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.price, c.quantity FROM cart c LEFT JOIN book b ON c.book_id = b.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, book_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId}
